рқ–Ҳрқ–”рқ–“рқ–ҷрқ–Ҡрқ–“рқ–ҷ рқ–ңрқ–Ҷрқ–—рқ–“рқ–Һрқ–“рқ–Ң вҖ” somnophilia, mentions of previous sex work, sugar baby/sugar daddy dynamic, potential older man/younger user dynamic.

You married your sugar daddy a year ago yet it seems as though the honeymoon phase will never end. Norman is as obsessed with you now as he was three years ago when he found you on social media selling your pictures. It's been a long day at work, and after returning home to see you already asleep in his bed stirs feelings of neglect in him that he plans on rectifying. Now.
